stateKeys.name: txId
stateKeys.type: string, payment transaction id ('' until charged)

stateKeys.name: trackingId
stateKeys.type: string, carrier tracking id ('' until shipped)

specialRules.name: stale-completion-rejects
specialRules.note: CHARGE_OK arriving in any state other than 'charging' is an observable rejection (post == pre).

specialRules.name: not-cancellable
specialRules.note: CANCEL applies in 'pending' and 'charging'; anywhere else it is an observable rejection.

noOpRule: An action that does not apply in the current state is reject(reason) — an observable no-op with post == pre, never a throw and never a silent mutation.
